title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Frankincense essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The oil's boswellic acids have been shown to reduce inflammation in the gut, which can help alleviate symptoms such as abdominal pain, diarrhea, and bloody stools.
